Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. The 185-Microsecond Type Hint 47 upvotes, 3 comments
  2. First in-utero stem cell therapy for fetal spina bifida repair is safe: study 259 upvotes, 50 comments
  3. The Cathode Ray Tube site 14 upvotes, 0 comments
  4. "That Shape Had None" – A Horror of Substrate Independence (Short Fiction) 83 upvotes, 15 comments
  5. RCade: Building a Community Arcade Cabinet 57 upvotes, 9 comments
  6. Inside the M4 Apple Neural Engine, Part 1: Reverse Engineering 280 upvotes, 74 comments
  7. Seed of Might Color Correction Process (2023) [pdf] 74 upvotes, 16 comments
  8. Show HN: I built a sub-500ms latency voice agent from scratch 217 upvotes, 62 comments
  9. Motorola announces a partnership with GrapheneOS 2083 upvotes, 744 comments
  10. How to Build Your Own Quantum Computer 45 upvotes, 11 comments
  11. Show HN: Visual Lambda Calculus – a thesis project (2008) revived for the web 23 upvotes, 4 comments
  12. Show HN: Govbase – Follow a bill from source text to news bias to social posts 162 upvotes, 72 comments
  13. British Columbia to end time changes, adopt year-round daylight time 496 upvotes, 267 comments
  14. The workers behind Meta’s smart glasses can see everything 672 upvotes, 378 comments
  15. Show HN: Pianoterm – Run shell commands from your Piano. A Linux CLI tool 42 upvotes, 15 comments
  16. LFortran compiles fpm 53 upvotes, 21 comments
  17. Closure of the Weatheradio Service in Canada 89 upvotes, 41 comments
  18. Against Query Based Compilers 30 upvotes, 10 comments
  19. Launch HN: OctaPulse (YC W26) – Robotics and computer vision for fish farming 67 upvotes, 30 comments
  20. OpenClaw Exposure Watchboard 30 upvotes, 13 comments
  21. Welcome (back) to Macintosh 267 upvotes, 183 comments
  22. Programmable Cryptography 49 upvotes, 26 comments
  23. Parallel coding agents with tmux and Markdown specs 130 upvotes, 103 comments
  24. What are your guilty displeasures? 28 upvotes, 24 comments
  25. Ask HN: Who is hiring? (March 2026) 177 upvotes, 227 comments
  26. iPhone 17e 210 upvotes, 285 comments
  27. New iPad Air, powered by M4 338 upvotes, 542 comments
  28. Ask HN: Who wants to be hired? (March 2026) 77 upvotes, 191 comments
  29. Show HN: Giggles – A batteries-included React framework for TUIs 4 upvotes, 4 comments
  30. Reflex (YC W23) Is Hiring Software Engineers – Python 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 11:30am, 3 March 2026. Source here.
